full_text:
Wang Sui 王遂
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Sui (王遂). Artisan who stole money, initially it was blamed on Zhu Ju. Wang Sui was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
